title: Upgrade three primary health centres in the constituency
description: Promised an upgrade of three identified primary health centres to 24x7 facilities by 2026. PIB notification dated April 2025 confirmed funding allocation; first centre operational from August 2025.

title: Add 50 new electric buses on local routes
description: Pledge to add 50 e-buses to existing local route network within the term. Procurement tender issued; deliveries pending.

title: Free water connection to every household in unauthorised colonies
description: Delhi Jal Board scheme extending Rs 100 connection fee. Notification dated 22 April 2025 — implementation window open.

title: Open 10 new municipal primary schools
description: Manifesto commitment to open 10 new schools by 2024. As of April 2025, no schools have been formally inaugurated; budget line item dropped from FY25-26.

title: Free wi-fi at every government school
description: Promise to install free, supervised wi-fi at all government schools in the constituency. Government of Delhi guidelines released 10 April 2025.

title: Skill-training stipend for unemployed youth
description: Monthly stipend of Rs 5,000 for skill training. No formal scheme notification yet.

title: Air quality monitoring at every ward
description: Install ward-level PM2.5 monitors with public dashboards. Delhi Government + CPCB scheme approved 10 March 2025; procurement deadline 30 April 2025.

title: Plant 1 lakh trees in the constituency
description: Pre-election promise to plant 1 lakh trees within the term.
